title: TuiSession vs session::Session vs ChatSession — three session formats for the same conversation
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: Stovepipe Systems / DRY
Location: src/tui/app.rs:27-127 TuiSession; src/session/mod.rs:78 Session, :52 SessionProgress, :352 SessionManager; src/cli/repl/mod.rs ChatSession (referenced via main.rs:56).
Violation: Three parallel session types exist with overlapping fields (id, title, created_at, updated_at, model, provider, messages). The TuiSession comment explicitly says it must be 'compatible with the CLI's ChatSession JSON format' — compatibility maintained by hand. Adding a field (e.g. behavioral mode) requires syncing three definitions. Token estimation, undo stacks, and title derivation exist only on TuiSession but logically belong on every session.
Mandated Refactor: Consolidate on a single pub struct Session in src/session/mod.rs with all required fields. Delete TuiSession and CLI ChatSession; both seams use the same Session. Move sessions_dir(), save_session, list_sessions (currently in tui/app.rs) to src/session/io.rs shared by both. Per user's stated preference for TUI/Claude-Code parity, Claude Code's ~/.claude/sessions single-format store is the target.
